summary: Frontend-only verification of Admin leads table + lead-detail modal vehicle-field fix. Logged into /admin (blank username, password LemonPros2026!), opened the Leads tab, found 1 existing lead, opened it via View. All assertions passed: table headers are [Name, Phone, Vehicle, Email, Revenue, Location, Date, ''] (Vehicle and Email present; Homeowner/Issue/Service NOT present), vehicle cell shows '2023 Ford F-150', and the lead-detail modal shows Vehicle Year=2023, Vehicle Make=Ford, Vehicle Model=F-150, Phone, Email, Address, Zip, Location, Campaign ID, Ad Group ID, Ad ID, Keyword, GCLID, Submitted. The strings 'Homeowner', 'Issue', and 'Service' do NOT appear in the modal. data-testids lead-detail-car-year / car-make / car-model / email are present and populated.

issues: Accessibility console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent. Non-blocking but should be addressed by adding <DialogDescription> for screen readers.

action_items: (Optional) Add a DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to the lead-detail Dialog to silence the Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx is ~480 lines and mixes leads list, lead modal, revenue/conversion logic. Consider extracting LeadDetailDialog into its own component for clarity/testability.
The lead-detail field array iterates with key={tid}, which is correct, but consider showing attribution rows only when at least one value exists to reduce visual noise for organic leads.
test_credentials: Admin owner: username blank, password 'LemonPros2026!' — verified working.
seed_data_creation: Used existing lead 'BackendTest Capture' (2023 Ford F-150) already in DB; did not need to click Submit Test Lead.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin lead table + modal vehicle-field migration is fully verified. AdminDashboard.jsx lines 282-303 (table headers/cells) and 357-378 (modal field array) are the authoritative source. If main agent re-renames any data-testid, update the assertions in this report. The test-lead button at data-testid='admin-create-test-lead-button' is functional but was not needed in this run because a real lead already existed in 'Today' range.
rca of the issue: N/A — original bug (template fields Homeowner/Issue/Service in modal) was already fixed by main agent before this iteration. Verification confirms the fix is live in the preview environment.
